periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny. High near 88, with temperatures falling to around 85 in the afternoon. Southwest wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 10pm. Partly cloudy. Low around 73, with temperatures rising to around 75 overnight. West southwest wind around 2 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

periods.name: Saturday
